description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test that runs on every push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has four jobs: build-wheel, test-nixos, test, and build-sdist-validate-dists. The build-wheel job builds a wheel distribution of the project and uploads it as an artifact. The test-nixos and test jobs download the wheel and run tests in different environments. The build-sdist-validate-dists job builds a source distribution and validates it.
